plot: Harry is an old-school car wash owner in Alabama who has a lot of soul searching to do when the child he once called "son" returns after 17 years as a proud trans woman named Desiree. Her homecoming brings together a hilarious cast of friends, coworkers, and love interests as Desiree and Harry try to get it right the second time around.
cast: Laverne Cox, George Wallace, Telma Hopkins, D.K. Uzoukwu, Jay Wilkison, Norah Murphy

name: 4K-AMZ - Harlem (2021) (US)
plot: Four stylish and ambitious best girlfriends in Harlem, New York City: a rising star professor struggling to make space for her love life; a savvy tech entrepreneur always dating someone new; a no-filter singer; and a hopeless romantic fashion designer. Together, they level up into the next phase of their careers, relationships, and big city dreams.
cast: Meagan Good, Jerrie Johnson, Grace Byers, Shoniqua Shandai, Tyler Lepley

plot: Traci Harmon, a veteran female training officer, and her rookie male ride-along, Alex Diaz, navigate the loss of a fellow officer and politics of modern day policing  — in the department and on the streets of Long Beach.

name: 4K-AMZ - Secret Level (2024) (US)
plot: Adult animated series of original short stories which are set within the worlds of beloved video games. Each episode serves as a gateway to a new adventure, unlocking exciting worlds from beloved gaming classics and highly anticipated new titles.

name: 4K-AMZ - Bandish Bandits (2020) (IN)
plot:
A classical singer Radhe falls in love with pop singer Tamanna and embarks on a path that forces him to compromise his classical roots. With time, both the singers try to get out of their comfort zone while  trying to protect their stardom. This series tests their resolve for their passion and love.
يقع المغني الكلاسيكي راده في حب مغنية البوب ​​تامانا ويسلك مسارًا يجبره على التنازل عن جذوره الكلاسيكية. مع مرور الوقت، يحاول المغنيان الخروج من منطقة الراحة الخاصة بهما مع محاولة حماية نجوميتهما. يختبر هذا المسلسل عزمهما على شغفهما وحبهما.
cast: Ritwik Bhowmik, Shreya Chaudhary, Atul Kulkarni, Sheeba Chaddha, Rajesh Tailang, Divya Dutta, Yashaswini Dayama

name: 4K-AMZ - The Sticky (2024) (US)
plot:
Ruth Clarke, a tough, supremely competent middle-aged Canadian maple syrup farmer has had it with being hemmed in by the polite, bureaucratic conventions native to her country’s identity. With the help of Remy Bouchard, a pint-sized local blockhead and an aging Mike Byrne, a low-level mobster, Ruth changes her fate — and transforms the future of her community with the theft of millions of dollars’ worth of maple syrup.
يتبع العمل قصة المزارعة (روث لاندري)، والتي تتورط في جريمة نتيجة للعديد من الضغوطات التي تتعرض لها، حيث تضطر للتعاون مع رجل عصابات من بوسطن وحارس أمن لتنفيذ عملية سرقة كبيرة
cast: Margo Martindale, Chris Diamantopoulos, Guillaume Cyr

name: 4K-AMZ - Dilemma (Dügüm)
plot:
Neslihan Turhan is the host of the TV show One Truth. She touches people's lives, sheds light on the stories that remain in the dark, and built her career on the principles of justice. Her life is upturned by the death of Lal Kaleli, in which Can, her son, is implicated. Caught between motherhood and all the principles that she believes in, Neslihan faces the most challenging trial of her life.
دراما مشوقة يكتشف فيها (جون) أن زوجة شريكه، وأقرب أصدقاءه (جيمس) على علاقة برجلٍ أخر، وهو الآن في معضلة شديدة عما إذا كان يتوجب عليه أن يخبره أم لا
cast: Bergüzar Korel, Caner Cindoruk, Serkan Altunorak, İbrahim Selim, Kaan Mirac Sezen

name: 4K-AMZ - Waack Girls (2024) (IN)
plot:
Six Kolkata girls create Waack Girls, a dance group in a city unfamiliar with waacking. Led by Ishani, an expert waacker and managed by Lopa, this light hearted story is filled with music, dance, comedy and drama.
تشكل ست فتيات في مدينة كلكتا بالهند فرقة رقص. نتابع مغامراتهن أثناء صراعهن مع أنفسهن والعالم. واك. بوم. باو. البطلتان هما خبير واك، زعيم المجموعة، ومديرهم المشاكس
cast: Mekhola Bose, Rytasha Rathore, Barun Chanda, Anasua Chowdhury, Chrisann Pereira, Priyam Saha, Ruby Sah, Achintya Bose

name: 4K-AMZ - Cruel Intentions (2024) (US)
plot: At an elite Washington, D.C.-adjacent university, two ruthless step-siblings will do anything to stay on top of the cutthroat social hierarchy. After a brutal hazing incident threatens the entire Greek Life system at their school, they'll do whatever is necessary to preserve their power and reputation – even if that means seducing, the daughter of the Vice President of the United States.
cast: Sarah Catherine Hook, Zac Burgess, Savannah Lee Smith, Sara Silva, John Harlan Kim, Khobe Clarke, Sean Patrick Thomas, Brooke Lena Johnson

name: 4K-AMZ - Mind the Malhotras (2019) (IN)
plot: When yet another married couple within their friend circle files for divorce, Rishabh and Shefali Malhotra fear that their marriage too may just be a ticking time bomb waiting to explode. They decide to seek professional help from a puzzling therapist who dredges up the most embarrassing and bizarre moments in the Malhotras' family life. This ranges from the quality of their sex life, the quirks of their three kids to the antics of Rishabh’s annoying mother.
cast: Anandita Pagnis, Rahul Verma, Mini Mathur, Cyrus Sahukar, Denzil Smith, Jason D'Souza, Nikki Sharma, Sushmita Mukherjee

name: 4K-AMZ - The Last Tycoon (2017) (US)
plot: From F. Scott Fitzgerald's last work, The Last Tycoon follows Monroe Stahr, Hollywood's Golden Boy as he battles father figure and boss Pat Brady for the soul of their studio. In a world darkened by the Depression and the growing influence of Hitler's Germany, The Last Tycoon illuminates the passions, violence and towering ambition of 1930s Hollywood.
cast: Matt Bomer, Kelsey Grammer, Lily Collins, Dominique McElligott, Enzo Cilenti, Mark O'Brien, Rosemarie DeWitt, Koen De Bouw

name: 4K-AMZ - Cross (2024) (US)
plot:
Alex Cross is brilliant, flawed, and full of contradictions. A doting father and family man, Cross is single-minded to the point of obsession when he hunts killers. He is desperate for love, but his wife’s murder has left him too damaged to receive it.
في إطار من الجريمة والغموض، يتبع العمل حياة المحقق الأرمل (أليكس كروس)، والذي يحارب ضد العديد من المجرمين، ويسعى لحل العديد من الألغاز المعقدة والغامضة.
cast: Aldis Hodge, Ryan Eggold, Isaiah Mustafa, Alona Tal, Johnny Ray Gill, Eloise Mumford, Sharon Taylor, Jennifer Wigmore

name: 4K-AMZ - Every Minute Counts (2024) (MX)
plot:
In 1985 Mexico City, a catastrophic earthquake buries thousands. A doctor with a dark past, a journalist chasing fame, and a family in distress risk their lives in rescue attempts. Their efforts become chances to change their own lives.
في عام 1985 في مكسيكو سيتي، أدى زلزال كارثي إلى دفن الآلاف. طبيب ذو ماض مظلم، وصحفي يبحث عن الشهرة، وعائلة في محنة يخاطرون بحياتهم في محاولات الإنقاذ. تصبح جهودهم فرصًا لتغيير حياتهم.
cast: Osvaldo Benavides, Maya Zapata, Luis Fernando Peña, Damayanti Quintanar, Mónica del Carmen, Enrique Arreola, Norma Angélica, Ángel Abundis

name: 4K-AMZ - Cromañón: The Night of the Fire (2024) (ARG)
plot:
It's 2008. A news story connects Malena, 22, with her traumatic past. In 2004, she attended a rock concert at the República de Cromañón venue, where a fire broke out, and 194 young people died. Now, four years later, a new event will link her to past loves and friendships, helping her overcome the guilt she feels for being alive.
إنه العام 2008. تربط قصة في الأخبار "مالينا"، ذات الـ22 ربيعاً، بماضيها المروّع. في عام 2004، ارتادت حفلة "روك" في نادي "ريبوبليكا دي كرومانيون"، حيث اندلع حريق راح ضحيته 194 شاباً. والآن، بعد مرور 4 سنوات، ستربطها أحداث جديدة بأحبائها وأصدقائها من الماضي، وستساعدها على تجاوز الشعور بالذنب لكونها نجت.
cast: Olivia Nuss, Toto Rovito

name: 4K-AMZ - Citadel: Honey Bunny (2024) (US)
plot:
When stuntman Bunny recruits struggling actress Honey for a side gig, they are hurled into a high-stakes world of action, espionage and betrayal. Years later, as their dangerous past catches up, the estranged Honey and Bunny must reunite and fight to protect their young daughter Nadia.
بعد سنوات من قيام الممثل البديل باني بتجنيد الممثلة الصاعدة هوني للقيام بعمل جانبي، يلاحقهما ماضيهما الخطير، مما يضطر الزوجين المنفصلين إلى لم شملهما وحماية ابنتهما
cast: Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Varun Dhawan, Kay Kay Menon, Simran, Saqib Saleem, Sikandar Kher, Soham Majumdar, Shivankit Singh Parihar

name: 4K-AMZ - Like a Dragon: Yakuza (2024) (JP)
plot: Set in the fictional town of Kamurocho, the story unfolds across two intersecting timelines—1995 and 2005. In 1995, four friends eager to escape their restrictive lives in an orphanage dive into the yakuza-controlled underworld of 1995 Kamurocho. Meanwhile, in 2005, their friendship is deteriorated, as tensions between the Tojo Clan and the Omi Alliance are at a boiling point.
cast: Ryoma Takeuchi, Kento Kaku, Yuumi Kawai, Subaru Shibutani, Hinano Nakayama

name: 4K-AMZ - The Devil's Hour
plot:
Lucy wakes every night at exactly 3:33am. Nothing in her life has made sense for a long time. But the answers are out there, somewhere, at the end of a trail of brutal murders.

تستيقظ لوسي كل ليلة في تمام الساعة 3:33 صباحًا. لم يكن أي شيء في حياتها منطقيًا لفترة طويلة. لكن الإجابات موجودة ، في مكان ما ، في نهاية سلسلة من جرائم القتل الوحشية
cast: Jessica Raine, Peter Capaldi, Nikesh Patel, Benjamin Chivers, Phil Dunster, Talia Walker Bassols, Rhiannon Harper-Rafferty, Alex Ferns

name: 4K-AMZ - We Are Golden (Somos oro) (2024) (ES)
plot: Vanessa and Marilú decide to leave behind the messed-up world they come from and set out to beat the system no matter the consequences. But when they finally start to see the fruits of their 'work,' they will realize that sometimes the mess isn't in the circumstances but within themselves.

name: 4K-AMZ - Citadel: Diana (2024) (IT)
plot:
Diana is a double agent for Citadel, who infiltrated Manticore, the rival agency that destroyed Citadel eight years ago. Trapped behind enemy lines, Diana has a chance to leave the agency forever, but she has to decide whether to trust a surprising ally: the heir of Manticore Italy, Edo Zani.
تدور الأحداث في عام 2030 بمدينة ميلان وقبل 8 أعوام من القضاء على وكالة (سيتادل) العالمية للتجسس، حيث تصبح (ديانا كافاليري) وحيدة ومحاصرة أمام خطوط العدو، ويصبح عليها التعاون مع حليف غير متوقع في سبيل النجاة
cast: Matilda De Angelis, Lorenzo Cervasio, Maurizio Lombardi, Thekla Reuten, Julia Piaton, Filippo Nigro, Bernhard Schütz

name: 4K-AMZ - En Fin (2024) (ES)
plot:
After the Apocalypse doesn't happen, Tomas tries to recover his past life, with little success, while Julia sees in the Non-End of the World a second chance to change her life. Their paths, opposites, will have to converge in the only thing that unites them right now: their daughter Noa.
يتخلى توماس عن زوجته وابنته عندما يتم الإعلان عن نهاية العالم، فقط للتوبة عندما لا تحدث نهاية العالم.

name: 4K-AMZ - Paper Girls (2022) (US)
plot:
It's the day after Halloween in 1988 when four young friends accidentally stumble into an intergalactic battle and find themselves inexplicably transported to the year 2019. When they come face-to-face with their adult selves, each girl discovers her own strengths as together they try to find a way back to the past while saving the world of the future.
في عام 1988 وبعد ساعات قليلة من ليلة الهالوين، تجد أربع فتيات في سن الثانية عشر من عمرهن أنفسهن في مهمة عصيبة، حينما يصبحن عالقين في المستقبل في مواجهة مع نسخهن الأكبر
cast: Camryn Jones, Riley Lai Nelet, Sofia Rosinsky, Fina Strazza

plot: Within the spectacular, complex and corrupt world of gladiatorial sports in Ancient Rome, follow an ensemble of diverse characters across the many layers of Roman society where sports, politics and business intersect and collide.
cast: Anthony Hopkins, Tom Hughes, Sara Martins, Jojo Macari, Gabriella Pession, Dimitri Leonidas, Moe Hashim, Iwan Rheon

name: 4K-AMZ - The Peripheral (2022) (US)
plot:
Stuck in a small Appalachian town, a young woman’s only escape from the daily grind is playing advanced video games. She is such a good player that a company sends her a new video game system to test…but it has a surprise in store. It unlocks all of her dreams of finding a purpose, romance, and glamour in what seems like a game…but it also puts her and her family in real danger.
يتبع الجهاز المحيطي فلاين فيشر ، وهي امرأة تتطلع إلى قطع دائرة أقاربها بشكل جماعي ، المنتشرة في زوايا منسية من الولايات المتحدة في اليوم التالي. فلين حكيمة وطموحة لكنها محكوم عليها بالفشل حتى تبتسم الثروة لها ولمكالماتها المستقبلية
cast: Chloë Grace Moretz, Gary Carr, Jack Reynor, T'Nia Miller, Katie Leung, Alex Hernandez, Austin Rising, Eli Goree

name: 4K-AMZ - The Boys (2019) (US)
plot: A group of vigilantes known informally as “The Boys” set out to take down corrupt superheroes with no more than blue-collar grit and a willingness to fight dirty.
cast: Karl Urban, Jack Quaid, Antony Starr, Erin Moriarty, Jessie T. Usher, Laz Alonso, Chace Crawford, Tomer Capone

director: Juan Carlos Pérez, Marta Betoldi, César Betancur

name: 4K-AMZ - Citadel (2023) (US)
plot:
What if you lost your memory? What if a spy didn’t know they were a spy? Years ago, the top agents of Citadel, Mason Kane and Nadia Sinh, had their minds wiped. But, they’re called back to action as sinister forces emerge from the past. With the help of spymaster Bernard Orlick, these former lovers must remember the past to save the future.
بعد سقوط وكالة التجسس العالمية “سيتادل” ومحو ذاكرة عملائها، تنهض نقابة “مانتيكور” لتكتسح الساحة دون أي رادع، فيسعى عملاء “سيتادل” لاسترجاع ذكرياتهم وحشد قواهم للتصدي لكارثة كبرى على وشك الحصول
cast: Richard Madden, Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Ashleigh Cummings, Roland Møller, Osy Ikhile, Caoilinn Springall, Lesley Manville, Stanley Tucci
director: Josh Appelbaum, Bryan Oh, David Weil

name: 4K-AMZ - STHLM Blackout (2024) (SE)
plot: Technical news-producer Arthur goes on a first date with true-crime enthusiast Mille. They are involuntarily caught in the center of a chaos, involving murder and sabotage. To survive, they must take matters into their own hands.
cast: Erik Johansson, Hanna Alström, Alba August, Tova Magnusson, Valter Skarsgård, Adam Pålsson, Lisa Carlehed, Zardasht Rad

name: 4K-AMZ - My Lady Jane (2024) (US)
plot:
Gird your loins for the tragic tale of Lady Jane Grey, the young Tudor noblewoman who was Queen of England for nine days and then beheaded, back in good ol’ 1553. Actually... f*ck that. We’re retelling history the way it should have happened: the damsel in distress saves herself. This is an epic tale of true love and high adventure set in an alt-universe of action, history, fantasy, comedy, romance, and rompy-pompy. Buckle up.
(جين غراي) كانت ملكة إنجلترا لمدة تسعة أيام ثم تم قطع رأسها، في عام 1553. لكن في هذا المسلسل ستواجه (جين غراي) مصيرًا مختلف وعلى ما يبدو قصة مختلفة تمامًا
cast: Emily Bader, Edward Bluemel, Anna Chancellor, Rob Brydon, Kate O'Flynn, Henry Ashton, Oliver Chris, Dominic Cooper

name: 4K-AMZ - Mirzapur (2018) (IN)
plot:
The iron-fisted Akhandanand Tripathi is a millionaire carpet exporter and the mafia don of Mirzapur. His son, Munna, is an unworthy, power-hungry heir who will stop at nothing to inherit his father's legacy. An incident at a wedding procession forces him to cross paths with Ramakant Pandit, an upstanding lawyer, and his sons, Guddu and Bablu. It snowballs into a game of ambition, power and greed that threatens the fabric of this lawless city.
تدور احداث المسلسل حول اكانداناند المليون ورجل المافيا وأبنه مونا الوريث الغير جدير بالسلطة والذي لن يتوقف عن فعل أي شئ حتى يرث إرث والده
cast: Ali Fazal, Pankaj Tripathi, Shweta Tripathi Sharma, Divyendu Sharma, Rasika Dugal, Kulbhushan Kharbanda, Harshita Gaur, Prashansa Sharma
director: Karan Anshuman, Puneet Krishna, Vineet Krishnan

name: 4K-AMZ - Inspector Rishi (2024) (IN)
plot:
A sceptic one-eyed crime branch Inspector Rishi Nandhan assisted by his two trusted sub-inspectors Ayyanar and Chitra, investigates strange and mind-bending cases involving supernatural or paranormal phenomena. He stops at nothing in his efforts to find the truth behind unexplainable murders while also battling various challenges in his personal life.
فرع الجريمة المتشكك المفتش ريشي ناندان، بمساعدة اثنين من المفتشين المساعدين أيانار وشيترا، يحقق في سلسلة من جرائم القتل الغريبة في قرية جبلية صغيرة، من المفترض أنها ارتكبت على يد روح غابة قاتلة تسمى فاناراتشي
cast: Naveen Chandra, Kanna Ravi, Malini Jeevarathnam, Sunaina, Shri Krishnadayal, Elango Kumaravel, Vela Ramamoorthy, Semmalar Annam

name: 4K-AMZ - The Source (Ourika) (2024) (FR)
plot:
In 2005, in a French suburb, a drug bust shatters the network of a family of drug dealers. Driss, a brilliant student, is forced to take over the family business, setting off on a downward spiral. Facing him is William, an ambitious and idealistic young cop who will do everything in his power to stop him. Their relentless struggle will take them from the suburbs to the Ourika valley.
في عام 2005، في إحدى الضواحي الفرنسية، أدت عملية اعتقال للمخدرات إلى تحطيم شبكة عائلة من تجار المخدرات. يضطر إدريس، الطالب المتفوق، إلى تولي إدارة أعمال العائلة، ليبدأ في دوامة من الانحدار. ويواجهه ويليام، الشرطي الشاب الطموح والمثالي الذي سيبذل كل ما في وسعه لإيقافه. إن كفاحهم الذي لا هوادة فيه سوف يأخذهم من الضواحي إلى وادي أوريكا
cast: Adam Bessa, Salim Kéchiouche, Noham Edje, Booba, Slimane Dazi, Max Gomis, Rayan Bouazza, Sawsan Abès

name: 4K-AMZ - The Baxters (2024) (US)
plot:
A riveting family drama that follows Elizabeth and John Baxter and their five adult children.
دراما عائلية مبنية على روايات كارين كينجسبري الأكثر مبيعًا، والتي تتبع إليزابيث وجون باكستر وأطفالهما البالغين، وهم يتنقلون في أعلى مستويات الحياة وأدنى مستوياتها، مع الله وبدونه.
cast: Ted McGinley, Ali Cobrin, Masey McLain, Josh Plasse, Emily Peterson, Asher Morrissette, Roma Downey

name: 4K-AMZ - Big Girls Don't Cry (BGDC) (2024) (IN)
plot:
In this coming-of-age drama series, five schoolgirls staying away from home find solace and friendship in each other. But their bonds are tested when they realize people change as they grow up. Welcome to Vandana Valley.
في هذا المسلسل الدرامي القادم عن سن الرشد، تجد خمس تلميذات بعيدات عن المنزل العزاء والصداقة في بعضهن البعض. لكن يتم اختبار روابطهم عندما يدركون أن الناس يتغيرون مع تقدمهم في السن
cast: Tenzin Lhakyila, Aneet Padda, Akshita Sood, Afrah Sayed, Avantika, Dalai, Vidushi, Pooja Bhatt

name: 4K-AMZ - The Expanse (2015)
plot:
A thriller set two hundred years in the future following the case of a missing young woman who brings a hardened detective and a rogue ship's captain together in a race across the solar system to expose the greatest conspiracy in human history.
تدور الاحداث بعد مائتي عام في المستقبل بعد حالة شابة مفقودة تجلب مخبرًا متشددًا وقبطان سفينة مارقة في سباق عبر النظام الشمسي لفضح أكبر مؤامرة في تاريخ البشرية
cast: Steven Strait, Dominique Tipper, Wes Chatham, Shohreh Aghdashloo, Frankie Adams, Cara Gee, Nadine Nicole, Keon Alexander

name: 4K-AMZ - Paatal Lok (2020) (IN)
plot:
A down and out cop lands the case of a lifetime when four suspects are nabbed in the assassination attempt of a prime time journalist. The case turns out to be a devious maze where nothing is what it looks like. The pursuit of it leads him to the dark netherworld - the 'Paatal Lok', and to shocking discoveries in the past of the four suspects.
شرطي يسقط ويخرج من القضية يوقع حالة من الحياة عندما يتم القبض على أربعة من المشتبه بهم في محاولة اغتيال صحفي في وقت الذروة
cast: Jaideep Ahlawat, Gul Panag, Neeraj Kabi, Swastika Mukherjee, Ishwak Singh, Niharika Lyra Dutt, Abhishek Banerjee, Jagjeet Sandhu

name: 4K-AMZ - The Man in the High Castle (2015)
plot:
Explore what it would be like if the Allied Powers had lost WWII, and Japan and Germany ruled the United States. Based on Philip K. Dick's award-winning novel.
خسر الحلفاء الحرب العالمية الثانية ، وأمريكا الآن منقسمة بين إمبراطورية اليابان وألمانيا النازية. بعد ما يقرب من عقدين من التعايش بين القوتين العظيمتين ، تبدأ اضطرابات مع ظهور اشرطة افلام تعرض واقع مغاير ، وشائعات حول تدهور صحة الفوهرر هتلر
cast: Alexa Davalos, Rufus Sewell, Joel de la Fuente, Jason O'Mara, Brennan Brown, Chelah Horsdal, Frances Turner

name: 4K-AMZ - Fleabag (2016)
plot:
Meet Fleabag. She's not talking to all of us; she's talking to YOU. So why don't you pop your top off and come right in? A window into the mind of a dry-witted, sexual, angry, porn-watching, grief-riddled woman, trying to make sense of the world.
مسلسل كوميدي مقتبس من المسرحية الحائزة على جوائز والتي تدور أحداثها حول امرأة شابة تحاول التأقلم مع الحياة في لندن بينما تتصالح مع مأساة حدثت مؤخرًا
cast: Phoebe Waller-Bridge, Sian Clifford, Andrew Scott

name: 4K-AMZ - Hush Hush (2022)
plot:
After a dangerous encounter at a party, four friends find themselves hurling down a rabbit hole of lies, deceit and secrets. As their safe, privileged world turns dark and dangerous, the secrets they keep become the bond for their survival. An intelligent cop is in pursuit, as the four friends try to keep up this deception.
عد صدام خطر في إحدى الحفلات، تجد 4 صديقات أنفسهنّ في حفرة من الأكاذيب والخداع والأسرار. بينما يتحوّل عالمهنّ الآمن والمميز إلى عالم مظلم وخطر، تصبح الأسرار التي يكتمنها بمثابة حافز لبقائهنّ على قيد الحياة. وتقوم شرطيّة حاذقة بمطاردتهنّ، بينما تحاول الصديقات الـ4 خداعها
cast: Juhi Chawla Mehta, Ayesha Jhulka, Soha Ali Khan, Karishma Tanna, Kritika Kamra, Shahana Goswami

name: 4K-AMZ - Panic (2021)
plot:
In the forgotten town of Carp, Texas, Panic is the only way out. Every summer the graduating seniors risk their lives competing in a series of challenges for the chance to win life-changing money. After the death of two players the stakes—and danger—have never been higher.
لا أحد يعرف من اخترع الذعر أو متى بدأ. ولكن في بلدة كارب الريفية المنسية بولاية تكساس ، فإن اللعبة هي السبيل الوحيد للخروج. في كل صيف ، يخاطر كبار السن المتخرجون بحياتهم في المنافسة في سلسلة من التحديات التي تجبرهم على مواجهة مخاوفهم العميقة من أجل الحصول على فرصة لكسب المال الذي يغير حياتهم. يمكن لأي شخص أن يلعب. واحد فقط سيفوز. لتبدأ الالعاب
cast: Olivia Scott Welch, Mike Faist, Jessica Sula, Camron Jones, Leslie Ann Leal, Enrique Murciano, Ray Nicholson, David W. Thompson

name: 4K-AMZ - Dhootha
plot: Journalist Sagar's life turns thrilling as he unravels dark secrets behind newspaper clippings predicting tragedies. He becomes a murder suspect, racing against time to clear his name and solve the enigma and faces dangerous twists. Suspense builds in this roller-coaster ride.
cast: Naga Chaitanya Akkineni, Priya Bhavani Shankar, Prachi Desai, Parvathy Thiruvothu, Tharun Bhascker, Rohini, Anish Kuruvilla, Srikant Murali

name: 4K-AMZ - Who killed him? (2024)
plot:
Through the points of view of the six people closest to him, the story of the unsolved murder of Mexican TV host Paco Stanley in 1999 is revealed behind the scenes where fame, betrayal and excess point to different suspects.
يروي الأحداث المحيطة بمقتل المذيع التلفزيوني باكو ستانلي، ويروي القصة قبل وبعد أحد أهم الأحداث الإعلامية في أواخر التسعينيات
cast: Roberto Duarte, Luis Gerardo Méndez, Diego Boneta, Zuria Vega, Belinda, Jorge Zárate, Javier Ramírez Gómez, Mauricio Pimentel
director: Humberto Hinojosa, Alexandro Aldrete, Rodrigo Ruiz Patterson

name: 4K-AMZ - Outer Range (2022)
plot:
A rancher fighting for his land and family stumbles upon an unfathomable mystery at the edge of Wyoming’s wilderness, forcing a confrontation with the Unknown in ways both intimate and cosmic in the untamable American West.
يسعى مزارع رفقة عائلته لحماية مزرعته وأرضه من الذين يريدون السيطرة عليها، لكن أمور غريبة وغامضة تحدث في أرضه تزرع بداخله الشك
cast: Josh Brolin, Imogen Poots, Lili Taylor, Tom Pelphrey, Tamara Podemski, Lewis Pullman, Noah Reid, Shaun Sipos

name: 4K-AMZ - Maxton Hall - The World Between Us (2024) (DE)
plot: When Ruby unwittingly witnesses an explosive secret at Maxton Hall private school, the arrogant millionaire heir James Beaufort has to deal with the quick-witted scholarship student for better or worse: He is determined to silence Ruby. Their passionate exchange of words unexpectedly ignites a spark...

name: 4K-AMZ - Fallout (2024) (US)
plot: The story of haves and have-nots in a world in which there’s almost nothing left to have. 200 years after the apocalypse, the gentle denizens of luxury fallout shelters are forced to return to the irradiated hellscape their ancestors left behind — and are shocked to discover an incredibly complex, gleefully weird, and highly violent universe waiting for them.
cast: Ella Purnell, Aaron Moten, Moisés Arias, Walton Goggins, Frances Turner

name: 4K-AMZ - Red Queen (Reina Roja)
plot:
A gifted woman's intellect brings chance to lead covert European police force. But it backfires, costing her everything. Following murder at her home and kidnapped heiress, her ex-supervisor enlists a policeman's aid to reinstate her.
"أنتونيا سكوت" أذكى امرأة في العالم، وجعلها ذكاؤها "الملكة الحمراء" في مشروع سريّ للشرطة. بعد ترك الخدمة بسبب الإيقاف التأديبي، يُحدث الشرطي "يون غوتييريز" الباسكيّ القوي والمثليّ، ثورةً في حياته وأساليبه في قضية اختطاف وقتل مثيرة.
cast: Victoria Luengo, Hovik Keuchkerian, Eduardo Noriega, Emma Suárez, Nacho Fresneda, Àlex Brendemühl, Fernando Guallar, Andrea Trepat

name: 4K-AMZ - P.I. Meena
plot:
Haunted by flashes of a tragic past, a private investigator, Meenakshi Iyer, aka P.I. Meena, starts investigating what seems like a routine hit-and-run case, only to discover that there's more to it than meets the eye and becomes entangled in a web of conspiracy that is tearing apart the worlds of everyone who comes close to it.
يتم إلقاء محققة خاصة شابة ومضطربة في عالم، حيث يتعين عليها أن تفهم ما لا يمكن فهمه وتجد نفسها
cast: Tanya Maniktala, Jisshu Sengupta, Parambrata Chatterjee, Vinay Pathak, Zarina Wahab, Saurav Das, Harsh Chhaya, Vipin Sharma

name: 4K-AMZ - Poacher
plot:
A group of Indian Forest Service officers, NGO workers, police constables and good samaritans risk their lives trying to track down the biggest elephant ivory poachers in the history of India and bring them to justice.
مجموعة من ضباط خدمة الغابات الهندية، والعاملين في المنظمات غير الحكومية، ورجال الشرطة، والسامريين الصالحين الذين يخاطرون بحياتهم في محاولة تعقب أكبر صيادين عاج الأفيال في تاريخ الهند
cast: Nimisha Sajayan, Roshan Mathew, Dibyendu Bhattacharya, Ankith Madhav, Kani Kusruti, Ranjitha Menon, Suraj Pops, Vinod Sherawat

name: 4K-AMZ - Bambai Meri Jaan
plot:
Bambai Meri Jaan chronicles the life of gangster Dara Kadri through the eyes of his father, an ex-cop, Ismail Kadri. In this season, we see how Dara puts everything at stake including his family as he goes on to become a cold-blooded, fearless gangster who uses his business acumen to fight not only the police and his rivals but also his own demons along the way.
تسلل إلى بومباي بعد الاستقلال والشوارع المليئة بالجريمة. رحلة شرطي صادق وهو يحاول حماية عائلته.
cast: Avinash Tiwary, Kay Kay Menon, Amyra Dastur, Kritika Kamra, Nawab Shah, Nivedita Bhattacharya, Saurabh Sachdeva, Vivan Bhatena

name: 4K-AMZ - Breathe: Into the Shadows
plot:
A 6-year old girl is kidnapped by a mysterious masked man, who demands an unusual ransom. To save his daughter, Dr. Avinash Sabharwal must kill someone! Meanwhile, Kabir Sawant's journey continues in the hostile environment of the Delhi Crime branch. Lies, deceit and mind games begin when Kabir is given charge of the investigation, and meets Avinash.
في عالم يسوده العنف والظلام والسوداوية، يصبح أب في حيرة بالاختيار لإنقاذ روح واحدة، ليجد نفسه في سلسلة من القرارات التي لا يمكنه التقاط أنفاسه خلالها

name: 4K-AMZ - Mr. & Mrs. Smith
plot:
Meet the Smiths: two lonely strangers, John and Jane, who have given up their lives and identities to be thrown together as partners – both in espionage and in marriage.
يحصل رجل وامرأة يعملان في وكالة تجسس على فرصة للحصول على الثروة والسفر وهويتين جديدتين لهما، من خلال زواج مرتب بينهما، وتتوالى الأحداث
cast: Donald Glover, Maya Erskine, Parker Posey, Beverly Glover, Wagner Moura, Alexander Skarsgård, Ron Perlman, Sharon Horgan

name: 4K-AMZ - The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel
plot:
It’s 1958 Manhattan and Miriam “Midge” Maisel has everything she’s ever wanted - the perfect husband, kids, and Upper West Side apartment. But when her life suddenly takes a turn and Midge must start over, she discovers a previously unknown talent - one that will take her all the way from the comedy clubs of Greenwich Village to a spot on Johnny Carson’s couch.
تدور أحداثه في خمسينات القرن الماضي يسرد قصة السيدة (ميدج مايزل) ربة المنزل التي تقرر أن تصبح مؤدية كوميدية بعد أن تمر ببعض التغييرات الحياتية والزوجية.
cast: Rachel Brosnahan, Alex Borstein, Michael Zegen, Tony Shalhoub, Marin Hinkle, Kevin Pollak, Caroline Aaron, Reid Scott

name: 4K-AMZ - Vadhandhi: The Fable of Velonie
plot:
Vivek, a diligent cop, takes charge of the investigation of the murder of a beautiful young girl, Velonie. The rumours about her that spring up post her death threatens to irrevocably damage Velonie's image, Vivek must wade through a web of half-truths and confusing leads to solve the case.
يتولّى الشرطي المجتهد “فيفيك” التحقيق في قضيّة مقتل الفتاة الشابّة الجميلة “فيلوني”. بينما يهدد التحقيق الإعلامي الظالم بتشويه سمعة “فيلوني” إلى الأبد، يتوجّب على “فيفيك” أن يواجه شبكة من الأكاذيب والأدلة المربكة لحل القضيّة
cast: S. J. Suryah, Sanjana Krishnamoorthy, Laila, Vivek Prasanna, Smruthi Venkat, Nassar, Vaibhav Murugesan, Aruvi Bala

name: 4K-AMZ - Everybody Loves Diamonds
plot:
A team of small-time Italian thieves who manage to deceive top-level security to steal millions of dollars' worth of precious stones from the Antwerp Diamond Centre.
يتبع فريق من اللصوص الإيطاليين الصغار الذين تمكنوا من خداع الأمن رفيع المستوى لسرقة أحجار كريمة بقيمة ملايين الدولارات من مركز أنتويرب للألماس.
cast: Kim Rossi Stuart, Anna Foglietta, Gianmarco Tognazzi, Carlotta Antonelli, Leonardo Lidi, Johan Heldenbergh, Kim Mousa, Issam Dakka

name: 4K-AMZ - Fakes (Farzi )
plot:
Sunny, a brilliant small-time artist is catapulted into the high-stakes world of counterfeiting when he creates the perfect fake currency note, even as Michael, a fiery, unorthodox task force officer wants to rid the country of the counterfeiting menace. In this thrilling cat-and-mouse race, losing is not an option!
(ساني)، فنان مبتدئ لامع، انخرط في عالم تزوير العملات، بعد ابتكاره عملة مزيّفة مثاليّة، بينما (مايكل)، عميل غير تقليدي في فرقة خاصة في الشرطة ، يحاول إنقاذ البلاد من خطر التزوير. في هذا السباق الذي يشبه ملاحقة القط والفأر، لا مجال للخسارة.
cast: Shahid Kapoor, Vijay Sethupathi, Kay Kay Menon, Raashii Khanna, Bhuvan Arora, Chittaranjan Giri, Amol Palekar, Zakir Hussain

name: 4K-AMZ - Bestseller
plot:
A novelist who is facing writer's block, meets a budding writer. Desperate, he decides to use her story for his next novel. At the same time, a film assistant is planning something vicious to destroy him and his close ones.
يلتقي الروائي الشهير “طاهر وزير” الذي يواجه انقطاع في الأفكار بالكاتبة الناشئة “ميتو ماتور”. هي من أشد معجبينه وتطلب مشورته. يقرر “طاهر” اليائس استخدام قصتها في روايته التالية. يخطط مساعد مخرج إعلانات تلفزيونية “بارث” لشيء شرير لتدمير “طاهر” والمقربين منه. هل سينجح؟ هل سيتمكن “طاهر” من كتابة روايته أفضل الكتب مبيعاً التالية؟ ينكشف كل شيء خلال 8 فصول!
cast: Vaishnavi Karmarkar, Mandar Gokhale, Lalita Amrutkar, Mithun Chakraborty, Shruti Haasan, Arjan Bajwa, Gauahar Khan, Sonalee Kulkarni

name: 4K-AMZ - Sweet Kaaram Coffee
plot:
Braving the unknown, three women of different generations living in the same house set off on an epic road trip as an attempt to put themselves before the people they are bound by for the first time.
يقدم لمحة من أحداث الحياة. ثلاث سيدات من أجيال مختلفة يعشن في المنزل نفسه ويحاولن لأول مرة إعطاء الأولوية لأنفسهن بدلاً من الأشخاص الذين يقمن على الاهتمام بهم. وتبدأ بعد ذلك رحلة مليئة بالمرح والتخبّط والبحث عن الذات.
cast: Madhoo, Lakshmi, Santhy Balachandran, Bala Suresh, Kavin Jay Babu, Dev, Vamsi Krishna, Samyuktha Viola Viswanathan

name: 4K-AMZ - No Traces (Sin huellas)
plot:
Desi and Cata find a body in the mansion they just finished cleaning. Horror. Panic. The police arrive. Wait a minute! Did a gypsy woman and a Mexican immigrant just clean up a crime scene? They’re the perfect culprits. Now they have to escape from the police. And also from Russian hitmen, a family of millionaires and an ex-husband with a mariachi band. Let's see how they get out of this mess.
انتهى الأمر بامرأتين مهمشتين اجتماعياً كمشتبه بهما في جريمة قتل قاما بتنظيف مسرح الجريمة للتو.
cast: Carolina Yuste, Camila Sodi, Silvia Alonso, Leonardo Ortizgris, Adrian Grösser, Borja Luna, Beka Lemondzhava, Antonín Ludvík Havel
director: Gabriel Ochoa, Sara Antuña, Carlos de Pando

name: 4K-AMZ - The Gryphon (Der Greif)
plot:
The Gryphon, a dark power from another world, is a threat to Mark and all he loves. Mark must accept his heavy family legacy and go into battle to save our world from the Gryphon’s clutches.
يتحدث المسلسل عن قوة مظلمة من عالم آخر ، تشكل تهديدًا لمارك وكل ما يحبه. يجب أن يقبل مارك إرث عائلته الثقيل ويخوض المعركة لإنقاذ عالمنا من براثن Gryphon.
cast: Jeremias Meyer, Zoran Pingel, Lea Drinda, Sabine Timoteo, Flora Thiemann, Yuri Völsch, Samirah Breuer, Thorsten Merten

name: 4K-AMZ - I'm a Virgo
plot:
A coming-of-age joyride about Cootie, a 13ft tall young Black man in Oakland, CA. Having grown up hidden away, Cootie soon experiences the beauty and contradictions of the world for the first time. He forms friendships, finds love, navigates awkward situations, and encounters his idol, a real life superhero named The Hero.
يتبع المسلسل “كوتي” وهو شاب يبلغ طوله قرابة الثلاثة أمتار يعيش في “أوكلاند” ولاية “كاليفورنيا” يواجه تحديات كبيرة نتيجة طوله الفارغ.
cast: Jharrel Jerome, Brett Gray, Kara Young, Allius Barnes, Olivia Washington, Mike Epps, Carmen Ejogo, Walton Goggins

name: 4K-AMZ - Misfortune (Mala fortuna)
plot:
Michi and Marie Claire come face to face as they try to get close to the Urquiza family, one of the richest families in Mexico. There are no holds barred as to who comes out on top.
يروي قصة روحين محطمتين تقومان بمحاولة أخيرة بحثًا عن المجد. يجتمعون مرة أخرى بهويات مزيفة ، والاستياء ، وبقايا حبهم ، بينما يتنافسون على الحساب المصرفي لأغنى عائلة في المكسيك.
cast: Macarena Achaga, Jorge López, Fátima Molina, Octavio Hinojosa Martínez, Antonia Zegers, Lisa Owen, Sylvia Pasquel, Ricardo Polanco

name: 4K-AMZ - Night Sky
plot:
Irene and Franklin York, a retired couple, have a secret: a Chamber buried in their backyard that miraculously leads to a strange, deserted planet. When an enigmatic young man arrives, the Yorks quiet existence is upended and the mysterious Chamber they thought they knew so well turns out to be much more than they could have ever imagined.
يتبع فرانكلين وإيرين يورك ، الزوجان اللذان اكتشفا منذ سنوات غرفة مدفونة في الفناء الخلفي لمنزلهما مما أدى لسبب غير مفهوم إلى كوكب غريب مهجور
cast: Sissy Spacek, J.K. Simmons, Cass Buggé, Adam Bartley, Chai Hansen, Julieta Zylberberg, Rocío Hernández, Kiah McKirnan

name: 4K-AMZ - Hunters
plot:
A diverse band of Nazi Hunters living in 1977 New York City discover that hundreds of high ranking Nazi officials are living among us and conspiring to create a Fourth Reich in the U.S. The eclectic team of Hunters set out on a bloody quest to bring the Nazis to justice and thwart their new genocidal plans.
تكتشف مجموعة من صائدي النازيين الذين يعيشون في مدينة نيويورك عام 1977 أن المئات من كبار المسؤولين النازيين يتآمرون ضد الولايات المتحدة، ليبدأ الفريق الانتقائي رحلة دموية لتقديمهم إلى العدالة.
cast: Logan Lerman, Jerrika Hinton, Lena Olin, Carol Kane, Josh Radnor, Greg Austin, Kate Mulvany, Tiffany Boone

name: 4K-AMZ - Swarm
plot:
A young woman's obsession with a pop star takes a dark turn.
هوس شابة بنجمة البوب يأخذ منعطفًا مظلمًا
cast: Dominique Fishback

name: 4K-AMZ - Forever
plot:
June and Oscar live a comfortable but very predictable wedded life when suddenly they find themselves in a completely unexpected situation, raising questions about love and marriage.
يعيش الزوجان (جون) و(أوسكار) حياة عادية تقليدية مملة بعد 12 سنة زواج، نفس الروتين اليومي، نفس العادات. ليبدأ بينهما حوار حول ما يعيشانه فيجدان نفسهما في وضع غير متوقع تمامًا.
cast: Maya Rudolph, Fred Armisen

name: 4K-AMZ - Happy Family, Conditions Apply
plot:
Meet the Dholakias, a family of four generations living under one roof, as they navigate the ups and downs of their lives. While they appear to be picture perfect, they are endearingly, heartbreakingly human, each with their unique quirks and quibbles. Follow their journey as they try their best to navigate through all the things life throws at them.
عائلة مكونة من أربعة أجيال تعيش تحت سقف واحد ، وهم يتنقلون في تقلبات حياتهم. على الرغم من أنها تبدو مثالية للصور ، إلا أنها إنسان محبب ومفجع ، ولكل منها المراوغات والمراوغات الفريدة. تابع رحلتهم وهم يبذلون قصارى جهدهم للتنقل عبر كل الأشياء التي تلقيها عليهم الحياة.
cast: Raj Babbar, Ratna Pathak Shah, Atul Kulkarni, Paresh Ganatra, Atul Kumar, Neha Julka, Nitish Kapoor, Ayesha Jhulka

name: 4K-AMZ - Goliath
plot:
Once a powerful lawyer, Billy McBride is now burned out and washed up, spending more time in a bar than a courtroom. When he reluctantly agrees to pursue a wrongful death lawsuit against the biggest client of Cooperman & McBride, the massive law firm he helped create, Billy and his ragtag team uncover a vast and deadly conspiracy, pitting them all in a life or death trial against the ultimate Goliath.
بيلي ماكبرايد - كان محامياً معروفاً قبل أن يفشل في قضية قتل فتى بريء ما أدى لانقلاب حياته رأساً على عقب وإدمانه الكحول فنتج عن ذلك انفصاله عن زوجته وطرده من عمله عن طريق رفيقه "كوبر". تمر الأيام ويجد "بيلي" نفسه وجهاً لوجه ضد "كوبر" في قضية تعيد إليه تلك الروح العالية التي كان عليها.
cast: Billy Bob Thornton, Nina Arianda, Tania Raymonde, Diana Hopper, Bruce Dern, Brandon Scott, Geoffrey Arend, Clara Wong

name: 4K-AMZ - Sneaky Pete
plot:
A con man on the run from a vicious gangster takes cover from his past by assuming the identity of his prison cellmate, Pete, “reuniting” with Pete’s estranged family, a colorful, dysfunctional group that threatens to drag him into a world just as dangerous as the one he’s trying to escape - and, just maybe, give him a taste of the loving family he’s never had.
يحاول رجل محتال الهرب من زعيم عصابات شرير يحاول النيل منه، ومن أجل الخروج من المأزق يقرر انتحال هوية صديقه المسجون (بيت)، ولكن حينما يقابل عائلته يكتشف أنه اختار عالمًا لا يقل خطورة عن العالم الذي هرب منه
cast: Giovanni Ribisi, Marin Ireland, Margo Martindale, Peter Gerety, Shane McRae, Libe Barer, Efrat Dor, Lindsey Pearlman

name: 4K-AMZ - The Widow
plot:
A woman's search to uncover the mystery of the disappearance of her husband leads her to the Congo, where she's forced to seek the truth about what happened to the man she loved.
تدور احداثه حول امرأة تدعى " جورجيا " تكتشف دليل يقودها الى السفر للكونغو للبحث عن زوجها الذي اختفى تحت ظروف غامضة
cast: Kate Beckinsale, Matthew Le Nevez, Alex Kingston, Charles Dance, Bart Fouche, Ólafur Darri Ólafsson, Shalom Nyandiko, Babs Olusanmokun

name: 4K-AMZ - Luden (Luden: Könige Der Reeperbahn)
plot:
Inspired by true events, the gangster epic LUDEN tells the rise of the Nutella Gang, the most famous pimp cartel in Hamburg's legendary Reeperbahn during the 1980s. The unusual cartel turns the rough red-light district in St. Pauli into a glamourous place, but it is also the beginning of a power struggle with the established pimps of the GMBH.

استناداً إلى أحداث واقعية، تروي ملحمة العصابات "لودن" قصة ظهور عصابة "نوتيلا"، أشهر عصابة قوادة في شارع "ريبربان" ذائع الصيت في "هامبورغ" خلال حقبة الثمانينيات. تحوّل هذه العصابة العجيبة حي الدعارة الخطر في "سانت باولي" إلى مكان مبهج، لكن صراعهم على السلطة يؤدّي إلى حرب لم تُشهد بعد مع عصابة القوادة، "جي إم بي إتش"
cast: Aaron Hilmer, Henning Flüsloh, Lena Urzendowsky, Noah Tinwa, Karsten Antonio Mielke, Stefan Konarske, Lara Feith, Jeanette Hain

name: 4K-AMZ - Hanna
plot:
This thriller and coming-of-age drama follows the journey of an extraordinary young girl as she evades the relentless pursuit of an off-book CIA agent and tries to unearth the truth behind who she is. Based on the 2011 Joe Wright film.

تدور احداث المسلسل حول رحلة فتاة شابة غير عادية ترعرعت في الغابة وهي تهرب من عميل للاستخبارات الامريكية وهي تحاول كشف الحقيقة .
cast: Esme Creed-Miles, Mireille Enos, Dermot Mulroney, Ray Liotta

name: 4K-AMZ - Tales from the Loop
plot:
The story of the town and people who live above “The Loop,” a machine built to unlock and explore the mysteries of the universe – making things possible that were previously relegated only to science fiction.

تطور تقني سريع في مدينة يفتح اسرار الكون ويجعل سكانها يختبرون اشياءا كانت تعتبر من قبيل الخيال العلمي في السابق.
director: Ato Essandoh, Jane Alexander, Rebecca Hall

name: 4K-AMZ - Dead Ringers
plot:
Elliot and Beverly Mantle are twins who share everything: drugs, lovers, and an unapologetic desire to do whatever it takes — including pushing the boundaries on medical ethics — in an effort to challenge antiquated practices and bring women’s healthcare to the forefront.

يقوم توأمان من طيف مختلف بمحاولة التأثير على طريقة الولادة بأسلوب مليء بالرعب والإثارة
cast: Rachel Weisz, Britne Oldford, Poppy Liu, Jennifer Ehle, Michael Chernus, Emily Meade, Ntare Guma Mbaho Mwine, Jennean Farmer

name: 4K-AMZ - The Horror of Dolores Roach
plot:
After an unjust 16-year prison sentence, Dolores Roach returns to a gentrified Washington Heights, where she reunites with an old stoner friend, Luis, who lets her live and work as a masseuse in the basement under his empanada shop. When the promise of her newfound stability is quickly threatened, “Magic Hands” Dolores is driven to shocking extremes to survive.

بعد أن تم سجنها لمدة 16 عامًا، تعود “دولوريس روتش” إلى حيّها القديم، فتعمل كمُدلّكة في قبو لأحد أصدقائها، وبعد أن ظنت أن أمورها تتحسن، حياتها تأخذ منعطفًا خطيرًا
cast: Justina Machado, Alejandro Hernandez, Kita Updike, K. Todd Freeman, Ilan Eskenazi, Jessica Pimentel, Jimmy Alvarez, Maureen Cassidy

name: 4K-AMZ - S.O.Z: Soldiers or Zombies
plot:
Drug lord Alonso Marroquín escapes from a Mexican prison in an attempt to go into hiding. A US military secret experiment goes wrong and the elite unit from the Mexican Police that is after Marroquín gets infected, creating a new zombie species. The Army and the zombies end up at the drug lord’s hideout and a battle for human survival begins.

يهرب ملك مخدرات من سجن مكسيكي شديد الحراسة مع ابنه ويجد ملاذًا في منشأة بعيدة لإعادة تأهيل المخدرات تقع على الجانب الأمريكي من الحدود حيث يواجهون كائنات زومبي مميتة
cast: Adria Morales, Sergio Peris-Mencheta, Nery Arredondo, Horacio García Rojas, Fátima Molina

name: 4K-AMZ - Tandav
plot:
Tandav is the coming together of different worlds under the gamut of politics. It is a dramatic take of the powerplay between people at the highest level where they get overthrown by others to secure their position. Young and upcoming student politicians are also featured and we get to see where their future is headed in this dark abyss of politics.

هي قصة تحدث في عاصمة أكبر دولة ديمقراطية في العالم - ديلي (نيودلهي) ، حيث تأخذك داخل الأبواب المغلقة والفوضوية للسلطة والتلاعب والكشف عن أحلك ممرات السياسة الهندية
cast: Saif Ali Khan, Dimple Kapadia, Mohammed Zeeshan Ayyub, Sunil Grover, Sarah-Jane Dias, Kritika Kamra, Bhavna Choudhary, Vikhyat Gulati

name: 4K-AMZ - Sebastian Fitzek's Therapy
plot:
With no witnesses, no traces, and no corpse, Josy, the 13-year-old daughter of well-known psychiatrist Viktor Larenz, has disappeared in unexplained circumstances. Two years later, a mysterious woman appears. She forces Viktor to face up to his daughter's disappearance and pushes him to his psychological limits.

إثارة نفسية مشوقة مبنية على رواية الكاتب "سيباستيان فيتزيك" الأكثر مبيعاً. لا يوجد شهود، ولا آثار، ولا جثة. تختفي "جوسي" ابنة الـ13 عاماً للطبيب النفسي الشهير "فيكتور لارنز" في ظروف غامضة. بعد عامين، تظهر امرأة غامضة، تُجبر "فيكتور" على التعامل مع اختفاء ابنته وتدفعه إلى أقصى حدوده النفسية
cast: Stephan Kampwirth, Trystan Pütter, Emma Bading, Helena Zengel, Andrea Osvárt, Martina Eitner-Acheampong, Eva M. Hirschburger, Samir Fuchs

name: 4K-AMZ - Love Addicts
plot:
Dennis can’t manage to separate himself from his possessive girlfriend. Nele chases away even the most perfect guys with her fairy tale fantasies. Mo freezes up when he is about to make an emotional connection. Katrin refrains from love, but makes up for it with throwaway sex.

يتبع أربعة شباب غير أسوياء يتسمون بالمغامرة والاضطراب والمرح
cast: Malaya Stern Takeda, Magdalena Laubisch, Dimitri Abold, Anselm Bresgott, Annette Frier

name: 4K-AMZ - Carnival Row
plot:
In a mystical and dark city filled with humans, fairies and other creatures, a police detective investigates a series of gruesome murders leveled against the fairy population. During his investigation, the detective becomes the prime suspect and must find the real killer to clear his name.

مدينة غامضة سوداوية، يعيش فيها البشر جنبًا إلى جنب مع الجنيات، يقوم محقق من الشرطة بالتحقيق بسلسلة جرائم قتل شنيعة تتعرض لها الجنيات، وأثناء التحقيق، يُصبح المحقق هو المشتبه به الرئيسي بجرائم القتل، ويتحتم عليه اكتشاف القاتل الحقيقي لتبرئة اسمه
cast: Orlando Bloom, Cara Delevingne, Simon McBurney, Tamzin Merchant, David Gyasi, Andrew Gower, Karla Crome, Arty Froushan

name: 4K-AMZ - Them
plot:
A limited anthology series that explores terror in America.

تنتقل عائلة سوداء إلى أحد أحياء لوس أنجلوس البيضاء بالكامل حيث تهدد القوى الخبيثة ، المجاورة والخارجية ، بمضايقتهم وتدميرهم وتدميرهم
cast: Deborah Ayorinde, Ashley Thomas, Shahadi Wright Joseph, Alison Pill, Melody Hurd, Ryan Kwanten

name: 4K-AMZ - The Rig (2023) (GB)
plot: When the crew of the Kinloch Bravo find themselves cut off from all communication with the Scottish mainland by a mysterious fog, they must fight to find a way home whilst managing environmental pressures, mounting paranoia and rising tensions. But as the threat facing them reveals itself to be something beyond their wildest imagination, the divided crew must form an alliance to ensure survival.
cast: Emily Hampshire, Iain Glen, Martin Compston, Rochenda Sandall, Owen Teale, Molly Vevers, Stuart McQuarrie, Alice Krige

name: 4K-AMZ - Expats
plot:
Set against the complex tapestry of Hong Kong residents, a multifaceted group of women sets off a chain of life-altering events that leaves everyone navigating the intricate balance between blame and accountability.

نظرة عن الحياة الشخصية والمهنية لثلاث نساء مغتربات يعشن في “هونغ كونغ”، تتلاقى طرقهن بعد مأساة عائلية مفجعة
cast: Nicole Kidman, Sarayu Blue, Ji-young Yoo, Jack Huston, Brian Tee, Tiana Gowen, Bodhi del Rosario, Amelyn Pardenilla

name: 4K-AMZ - Zorro
plot:
Diego de la Vega returns to California to avenge his father's murder. After assuming the title of Zorro, he confronts the Governor, the malevolent leader of the Chinese community and a secret society, placing the common good above all.

دييغو دي لا فيغا يعود إلى كاليفورنيا للانتقام من قتل والده. بعد أن يتولى لقب زورو، يواجه الحاكم، زعيم الجالية الصينية الشرير، وجمعية سرية، ويضع مصلحة الجميع فوق كل شيء.
cast: Miguel Bernardeau, Renata Notni, Dalia Xiuhcoatl, Emiliano Zurita, Paco Tous, Rodolfo Sancho, Cristo Fernández, Luis Tosar

name: 4K-AMZ - Indian Police Force
plot:
Follows the harrowing journey of Delhi Police Officer Kabir Malik as he battles an insidious adversary, Zarar, who has chosen the path of terrorism.

القوات المسلحة الهندية، سلسة مليئة بالحركة، تتتبّع الرحلة الشيّقة لعنصر شرطة دلهي، كبير مالك، بينما يواجه خصماً ماكراً، زارار، الذي اختار طريق الإرهاب. تكشف هذه السلسلة الشرطية السعي المتواصل إلى العدالة، والتضحيات التي يشهدها أداء الواجب
cast: Sidharth Malhotra, Shilpa Shetty Kundra, Vivek Oberoi, Isha Talwar, Mukesh Rishi, Shweta Tiwari, Mrinal Kulkarni, Nikitin Dheer

name: 4K-AMZ - No Activity: Italy (No Activity: Niente da Segnalare)
plot:
Three couples on very different duties -- 2 cops, 2 dispatch officers and 2 criminals -- are stuck together in their narrow workspace, be it a police car, a radio station or a container. As the wait prolongs, their personal stories unfold in comic dialogues and unusual bonds form.

ثلاثة أزواج يقومون بواجبات مختلفة تمامًا - شرطيان، وضابطا إرسال، واثنان من المجرمين - عالقون معًا في مساحة عملهم الضيقة، سواء كانت سيارة شرطة أو محطة راديو أو حاوية. ومع طول الانتظار، تتكشف قصصهم الشخصية في حوارات كوميدية وشكل روابط غير عادية.
cast: Luca Zingaretti, Rocco Papaleo, Carla Signoris, Emanuela Fanelli, Fabio Balsamo, Alessandro Tiberi, Maccio Capatonda, Tommaso Ragno

name: 4K-AMZ - El juego de las llaves (The Game of Keys) (2019) (MX)
plot:
A casual encounter between Adriana and Sergio, two former high school friends, triggers the beginning of the game of the keys where four couples generate new sexual and emotional combinations in a dangerous and lustful game.

The game consists of everyone putting their keys in a bowl. At random, each one chooses some keys and he must go to spend the night with the owner of the keys. This game will revolutionize the group of friends and their lives. It will make them discover who they are and what they really want.
cast: Maite Perroni, Humberto Busto, Marimar Vega, Fabiola Campomanes, Hugo Catalán, Horacio Pancheri, Sebastián Zurita, Ela Velden

name: 4K-AMZ - Escort Boys
plot: In Camargue, four guys in dire straits turn to escorting to save their childhood beekeeping estate. Coached by the group's little sister who manages this unique 'business' in the region, they will have to service women and, through their desires... learn to be men of today.
cast: Guillaume Labbé, Thibaut Évrard, Corentin Fila, Simon Ehrlacher, Marysole Fertard, Frédéric Fix, Richard Darancy, Fleur Copin

name: 4K-AMZ - Gigolò per caso
plot: When his father Giacomo comes back into his life after a heart attack, Alfonso has to cope with a life-changing truth: his father is a gigolo. After a series of unfortunate events, Alfonso is forced to follow in his father's footsteps.
cast: Christian De Sica, Pietro Sermonti, Ambra Angiolini, Frank Matano, Asia Argento, Claudio Gregori, Antonio Bannò, Francesco Bruni

name: 4K-AMZ - Los Farad
plot: The day Oskar, a typical local boy, crosses paths with the mysterious and wealthy Farad family, his life changes forever. Oskar enters a winner-take-all game, the world of international arms trafficking. In Marbella where the Farads live, luxury, adrenaline and intense emotions await him... But also a backside of violence and cynicism that tests his will.
cast: Miguel Herrán, Susana Abaitua, Pedro Casablanc, Adam Jezierski, Nora Navas, Amparo Piñero, Fernando Tejero, Igal Naor

name: 4K-AMZ - The Continental: From the World of John Wick
plot: Winston Scott is roped into a world of assassins and must make things right after his brother's attack on the Continental hotel.
cast: Mel Gibson, Colin Woodell, Mishel Prada, Ben Robson, Hubert Point-Du Jour, Nhung Kate, Jessica Allain, Ayomide Adegun
director: Greg Coolidge, Kirk Ward, Shawn Simmons

name: 4K-AMZ - De viaje con los Derbez
plot: The series follows the fun and endearing Derbez family as they discover new cultures in foreign lands and for the first time – all together and unfiltered.
cast: Eugenio Derbez, Aislinn Derbez, Vadhir Derbez

name: 4K-AMZ - Shehar Lakhot
plot: A man who, against his will, goes back to his hometown, where he is forced to face his history and prove his innocence.
cast: Priyanshu Painyuli, Chandan Roy Sanyal, Kubbra Sait, Manu Rishi Chadha, Shruthy Menon, Kashyap Harsha Shangari, Manjiri Pupala, Shruti Jolly

name: 4K-AMZ - The Village
plot: A horror thriller about Gautham, a stranded urbanite and his three unlikely companions who brave an eerie village to rescue his missing family in one night.
cast: Arya, John Kokken, Adukalam Naren, Muthukumar, Divya Pillai, Baby Aazhiya, Thalaivasal Vijay, George Mariyan

name: 4K-AMZ - In Your Dreams
plot: Best friends, Marcus and Lloyd, have just been evicted from their apartment and are struggling to keep their pest control business afloat. Then an old classmate introduces them to an ancient African statue that just might be the answer to their prayers. The tribe who created the relic believes it has the power to make dreams come true. Just not the kind of dreams our friends were hoping for.
cast: Thando Thabethe, Anthony Oseyemi, Kiroshan Naidoo

name: 4K-AMZ - New Bandits
plot: Adrift and desperately needing money to pay for his ailing adoptive father's care, Ubaldo, a bank clerk who's unable to remember his childhood, receives an inheritance that will change his destiny for good. He goes to Cratará, in the heart of the northwest desert, where he'll become the leader of a pack of ruthless bandits, fulfilling the legacy of his biological father - a mythical cangaceiro.
cast: Allan Souza Lima, Alice Carvalho, Thainá Duarte, Ricardo Blat, Marcélia Cartaxo, Hermila Guedes, Enio Cavalcante, Adélio Lima

name: 4K-AMZ - Wilderness
plot: A dream holiday becomes a nightmare for a young British couple who seemingly have it all, as heartbreak turns into fury and revenge.
cast: Jenna Coleman, Oliver Jackson-Cohen, Ashley Benson, Eric Balfour, Morgana Van Peebles, Claire Rushbrook, Talia Balsam, Marsha Stephanie Blake

name: 4K-AMZ - Harlan Coben's Shelter
plot: Follow the story of Mickey Bolitar after the death of his father leads him to start a new life in suburban New Jersey. When another new student disappears, Mickey finds himself tangled in a web of secrets. With the help of two new friends, Spoon and Ema, they reveal a dark underground that may hold the answers to decades of disappearances.
cast: Jaden Michael, Constance Zimmer, Adrian Greensmith, Abby Corrigan, Sage Linder, Brian Altemus

name: 4K-AMZ - The Wheel of Time (2021) (US)
plot: Follow Moiraine, a member of the shadowy and influential all-female organization called the “Aes Sedai” as she embarks on a dangerous, world-spanning journey with five young men and women. Moiraine believes one of them might be the reincarnation of an incredibly powerful individual, whom prophecies say will either save humanity or destroy it.
cast: Rosamund Pike, Daniel Henney, Josha Stradowski, Zoë Robins, Madeleine Madden, Marcus Rutherford, Dónal Finn, Ceara Coveney

name: 4K-AMZ - Romancero
plot: Jordán and Cornelia are two young kids who, in the dead of night, are trying to escape the angry mob accusing them of murder. Fearing for their lives, they flee from the law, from the supernatural and even from themselves.
cast: Sasha Cócola, Elena Matić, Ricardo Gómez, Guillermo Toledo, Belén Cuesta, Julieta Cardinali, Alba Flores, Malcom Sitté

name: 4K-AMZ - Love is For the Strong
plot: Love Is For the Strong tells the story of two mothers in search for justice after a police invasion in their community led to a tragedy that changed the lives of these two families forever. On one hand, Rita deals with the death of her youngest son, Sushi. On the other, Edna, the mother of police officer Digão, faces the consequences of her son's actions during the operation.
cast: Sain Ktt, Clara Moneke, Don Negralla, Liza Del Dala, Mariana Nunes, Tatiana Tiburcio, Breno Ferreira, Maicon Rodrigues

name: 4K-AMZ - Gen V (2023) (US)
plot: At America's only college for superheroes, gifted students put their moral boundaries to the test, competing for the university's top ranking, and a chance to join The Seven, Vought International's elite superhero team. When the school's dark secrets come to light, they must decide what kind of heroes they want to become.
cast: Jaz Sinclair, Lizze Broadway, Maddie Phillips, London Thor, Derek Luh, Asa Germann, Sean Patrick Thomas, Hamish Linklater
director: Craig Rosenberg, Evan Goldberg, Eric Kripke

name: 4K-AMZ - Club Hooligans (Barrabrava) (2023) (UY)
plot: After vicious infighting, two brothers are expelled of their beloved team’s gang. Alone, without money or political protection, they start a war that puts their brotherhood to the test.
cast: Gastón Pauls, Matías Mayer, Gustavo Garzón, Liz Solari, Pablo Alarcón, Mónica Gonzaga, Candelaria Molfese, Juan Ignacio Cane

name: 4K-AMZ - The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power (2022) (US)
plot: Beginning in a time of relative peace, we follow an ensemble cast of characters as they confront the re-emergence of evil to Middle-earth. From the darkest depths of the Misty Mountains, to the majestic forests of Lindon, to the breathtaking island kingdom of Númenor, to the furthest reaches of the map, these kingdoms and characters will carve out legacies that live on long after they are gone.
cast: Morfydd Clark, Charlie Vickers, Robert Aramayo, Daniel Weyman, Markella Kavenagh, Charles Edwards, Ismael Cruz Cordova, Owain Arthur

name: 4K-AMZ - Reacher (2022) (US)
plot: Jack Reacher, a veteran military police investigator, has just recently entered civilian life. Reacher is a drifter, carrying no phone and the barest of essentials as he travels the country and explores the nation he once served.
cast: Alan Ritchson, Maria Sten
